return-after-state fixture

This page is checked into the test fixtures so the byte-level token-cost guard for issue #845 stays deterministic. Do not modify without updating tests/e2e/return-after-state.test.ts baselines.

Primary panel

Click the button to flip the status indicator below.

idle

Secondary panel

Static text used to pad the snapshot so the byte-savings comparison is meaningful (the savings come from collapsing two MCP envelopes, not from the page content itself).
